salon.name: The Nail Lounge @ Stokesley
salon.tagline: Here for Pretty Nails, Quality and Trust.
salon.address: 33 High St, Stokesley, Middlesbrough, United Kingdom

extensions_hands.name: Builder Gel on Natural Nail - New Set
Builder Gel on Natural Nail - Infill

testimonials.name: Megan S
testimonials.text: So happy with my nails! The atmosphere is great, and the staff really takes care of you. Their beauty services are just as amazing!

testimonials.name: Lucy H
testimonials.text: Great service, friendly staff, and beautiful nails every time! I always get compliments after visiting The Nail Lounge @ Stokesley. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Isabelle C
testimonials.text: From start to finish, my experience was amazing. The salon is so relaxing, and my nails and brows were done with so much care. Can't wait to return!

testimonials.name: Angela Stevens
testimonials.text: I have just had the most amazing manicure and pedicure at The Nail Lounge @ Stokesley. The staff are so welcoming and they definitely know their craft!

testimonials.name: Sophie W
testimonials.text: Absolutely love my nails! The team at The Nail Lounge @ Stokesley is so talented and professional. My gel manicure lasted weeks without chipping.

testimonials.name: Emma T
testimonials.text: Such a relaxing experience! The salon is beautiful, the staff is welcoming, and my nails look flawless. I've finally found my go-to spot!

testimonials.name: Laura P
testimonials.text: The attention to detail here is outstanding. My nails are always perfect, and my brows have never looked better after their expert threading.

testimonials.name: Jessica R
testimonials.text: A fantastic salon! The quality of work is incredible, and the customer service is top-notch. My nails and treatments are always perfect!

testimonials.name: Charlotte M
testimonials.text: Had the most amazing pedicure at The Nail Lounge @ Stokesley! My feet feel so soft, and the polish is still perfect. Definitely a must-visit!

testimonials.name: Rachel D
testimonials.text: Such a wonderful experience! The staffs are friendly, the salon is spotless, and my nails, lashes, and brows have never looked better. Five-star service!

testimonials.name: Olivia K
testimonials.text: I love how professional and caring the team is. My nails always turn out exactly how I want them, and their lash extensions are stunning!

testimonials.name: Natalie B
testimonials.text: The best manicure I've had in ages! The nail technicians are so skilled. Highly recommend!
